text: Wherever in this division the word “department” occurs, it means the Department of the California Highway Patrol.
markdown:
# Vehicle Code
## Division 12. EQUIPMENT OF VEHICLES [24000 - 28244]
### Chapter 1. General Provisions [24000 - 24020]
##### § 24000

Wherever in this division the word “department” occurs, it means the Department of the California Highway Patrol.

*(Enacted by Stats. 1959, Ch. 3.)*

subsections.text: Wherever in this division the word “department” occurs, it means the Department of the California Highway Patrol.
